title: Smart Debt Simplifier
description: Built a React.js visual tool leveraging a greedy algorithm to optimize group debt settlements, reducing redundant transactions from O(N2) to O(N-1).

title: Signal Processing App (Ongoing Project)
description: A web app that combines Electrical Engineering concepts with web development and AI. Users can generate, visualize, and filter signals to make learning more interactive and intuitive.

title: URL Shortener
description: Created a web application to shorten long URLs, making them easier to share and manage.

title: Portfolio Website
description: It showcases my skills, projects, and contact information with a clean, responsive UI.
